name: Zhejiang Guyuelongshan Shaoxing Wine Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Guyuelongshan Shaoxing Wine Co., Ltd. produces and distributes wine products in China and internationally. The company's products include Shaoxing yellow wine, fruit wine, and other wine products. It also produces and distributes glass bottles, biological products, and plastic products. In addition, the company is involved in the import and export trading business. Zhejiang Guyuelongshan Shaoxing Wine Co., Ltd. is based in Shaoxing, China.
